info.description: Multi-tenant API built with hexagonal architecture. Provides identity management, tenant management, email templates, and more.
info.title: Hexagonal Go API

post.description: Assigns a role to a user within a tenant
Revokes a role assignment from a user

get.description: Retrieves all audit entries performed by a specific user
Retrieves audit entries with optional filtering and pagination
Retrieves a single audit entry by its ID
Returns OK if the audit service is healthy
Retrieves all audit entries for a specific resource

post.description: Authenticates a user with email and password, returns JWT tokens

403.description: Account suspended or email not verified

post.description: Invalidates the current session and access token

get.description: Redirects to the OAuth provider's authorization page. After authorization, the provider will redirect back to the callback endpoint.

parameters.description: Tenant ID for new user registration
parameters.name: tenant_id

get.description: Handles the callback from the OAuth provider after user authorization. Exchanges the authorization code for tokens and logs the user in.

400.description: Invalid state, missing code, or unsupported provider

post.description: Sends a password reset email to the specified address if it exists
Resets the user's password using a valid reset token

400.description: Invalid request body or weak password

post.description: Exchanges a valid refresh token for a new access token

get.description: Retrieves a paginated list of email templates with optional filters

post.description: Creates a new email template with subject, body, and variable definitions

get.description: Retrieves an email template by its slug and locale

post.description: Renders an email template by slug with provided data for preview

parameters.description: Preview request with slug and data
parameters.name: request

400.description: Invalid request body or missing slug

get.description: Retrieves an email template by its unique identifier

400.description: Invalid request body or template ID

post.description: Activates a draft or archived template, making it available for use
Archives an active template, removing it from active use
Renders an email template with provided data for preview

400.description: Invalid request body or template ID

get.description: Retrieves a paginated list of feature flags

parameters.description: Search by key, name, or description
parameters.name: search

post.description: Creates a new feature flag

get.description: Retrieves a feature flag by its key
Retrieves a feature flag by its unique identifier

400.description: Invalid request body or flag ID

post.description: Disables a feature flag
Enables a feature flag
Sets an override for a specific target (tenant or user)

400.description: Invalid request body or flag ID

delete.description: Removes an override for a specific target

400.description: Invalid request body or flag ID

post.description: Adds a targeting rule to a feature flag

400.description: Invalid request body or flag ID

delete.description: Removes a targeting rule from a feature flag

400.description: Invalid flag ID or rule ID

post.description: Evaluates a feature flag for the given context

get.description: Checks if the current user has a specific permission
Returns OK if the permissions service is healthy
Retrieves all effective permissions for the current user
Retrieves a paginated list of roles

post.description: Creates a new role with specified permissions

get.description: Retrieves a role by its unique identifier

put.description: Updates a role's name and description

delete.description: Deletes a role and all its assignments

get.description: Retrieves active sessions for the currently authenticated user
Retrieves a paginated list of tenants with optional filters

post.description: Creates a new tenant with the specified details. Requires admin privileges.

400.description: Invalid request body or validation error

get.description: Retrieves a tenant by its URL-friendly slug identifier
Retrieves a tenant by its unique identifier

delete.description: Soft-deletes a tenant. Requires admin privileges.

patch.description: Updates tenant details. Requires admin privileges.

post.description: Changes the tenant's subscription plan. Requires admin privileges.
Reactivates a suspended tenant. Requires admin privileges.

put.description: Updates tenant-specific configuration settings. Requires admin privileges.

post.description: Suspends a tenant, preventing access to their resources. Requires admin privileges.

get.description: Retrieves a paginated list of users with optional filters
Retrieves the currently authenticated user's profile

post.description: Changes the authenticated user's password

400.description: Invalid request body or weak password

post.description: Creates a new user account with email and password

400.description: Invalid request body or validation error

get.description: Verifies a user's email address using the token sent via email

post.description: Verifies a user's email address using the token sent via email

get.description: Retrieves a user by their unique identifier

delete.description: Soft-deletes a user account. Requires admin privileges.

post.description: Reactivates a suspended user account. Requires admin privileges.
Changes a user's role. Requires admin privileges.
Suspends a user account, preventing login. Requires admin privileges.

get.description: Returns OK if the service is healthy
